description: MCP server for Atlassian Jira Data Center - search, view, and create issues
name: io.github.MrRefactoring/atlassian-dc-mcp-jira

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a shared dotenv-style config file. When set, values are read from this file before direct environment variable overrides are applied.
environmentVariables.name: ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Jira host domain (e.g. your-instance.atlassian.net). Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE or JIRA_API_BASE_PATH.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Jira API base path (alternative to JIRA_HOST). Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE or JIRA_HOST.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_API_BASE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Jira Personal Access Token or API token. Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_API_TOKEN
